name: Scampi Mare Nostrum - La Scala
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the prawns butterfly fashion in a baking dish. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Combine oil, wine, lemon juice, fish stock, shallots, basil, and oregano in a bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over the prawns, turning to coat well.
4. Marinate for 1 hour.
5. When ready to cook, remove prawns from marinade, shaking off excess.
6. Place under broiler and broil for 10 minutes or until golden.
7. Do not overcook.
